message:
🌱 Add crossplane: Composition Dependency and Ordered Creation mission (#1649)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-2072-composition-dependency-and-ordered-creation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: Composition Dependency and Ordered Creation",
+    "description": "Composition Dependency and Ordered Creation. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\nAlthough my default Crossplane creates all resources in a composition in order, this typically does not include the entire reconciliation lifecycle for provisioning some abstract resource."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Composition Dependency and Ordered Creation",
+        "description": "Hmm, interesting, could #1770 be used to create a reference from a job to some other resource such that the creation is blocked until the other resource finishes being provisioned? I could see that working, although it does feel like a slightly hacky solution. \n\nAs for what I mentioned before,\n```yaml\nName:         apqa-test-1-g7nff\nNamespace:    \nLabels:       crossplane.io/claim-name=\n              crossplane.io/claim-namespace=\n              crossplane.io/composite=apqa-test-1\n              name=eks-cluster-role\nAnnotations:  crossplane.io/composition-resource-name: eks-cluster-role\n              crossplane.io/external-create-pending: 2022-02-01T17:43:13Z\n              crossplane.io/external-create-succeeded: 2022-02-01T17:43:14Z\n              crossplane.io/external-name: apqa-test-1-g7nff\nAPI Version:  iam.aws.crossplane.io/v1beta1\nKind:         Role\nMetadata:\n  Creation Timestamp:  202\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Composition Dependency and Ordered Creation\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hmm, interesting, could #1770 be used to create a reference from a job to some other resource such that the creation is blocked until the other resource finishes being provisioned? I could see that working, although it does feel like a slightly hacky solution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Name:         apqa-test-1-g7nff\nNamespace:    \nLabels:       crossplane.io/claim-name=\n              crossplane.io/claim-namespace=\n              crossplane.io/composite=apqa-test-1\n              name=eks-cluster-role\nAnnotations:  crossplane.io/composition-resource-name: eks-cluster-role\n              crossplane.io/external-create-pending: 2022-02-01T17:43:13Z\n              crossplane.io/external-create-succeeded: 2022-02-01T17:43:14Z\n              crossplane.io/external-name: apqa-test-1-g7nff\nAPI Version:  iam.aws.crossplane.io/v1beta1\nKind:         Role\nMetadata:\n  Creation Timestamp:  2022-02-01T17:43:13Z\n  Finalizers:\n    finalizer.managedresource.crossplane.io\n  Generate Name:  apqa-test-1-\n  Generation:     33\n  Managed Fields:\n    API Version:  iam.aws.crossplane.io/v1beta1\n    Fi",
+        "kind: Cluster\n        spec:\n          forProvider:\n            roleArnSelector:\n              matchControllerRef: true\n              matchLabels:\n                name: eks-cluster-role",
+        "policy:\n            fromFieldPath: Required"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "crossplane",
+      "graduated",

+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },
